Member-only story

Linux

Coding

Programming

Technology

Tech

Learn how to install WSL2, choose your Linux distribution, set up your Linux user, verify your installation, and prepare your Windows PC for Linux development.

4 min read
Just now

--

Press enter or click to view image in full size

Made with CnavaAiBefore You Start
Make sure your computer meets these requirements.

• Windows 11
or

• Windows 10 Version 2004 or later
You should also have:

• Administrator access

• Internet connection
If you are new to WSL2 and want to understand what it is before installing it, I recommend reading my previous article, WSL2 Explained: The Smartest Way to Run Linux on Windows. It explains how WSL2 works, why Microsoft created it, and why it has become the preferred way to run Linux on Windows. Once you understand the basics, come back here and follow this installation guide.
Step 1: Open PowerShell as Administrator
Click Start.
Search for PowerShell.
Right-click Windows PowerShell and select Run as administrator.
Step 2: Install WSL2
